headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录276篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究188篇, 开源项目44篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API14篇。热门标签：Agent（74篇）。其中6%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ msitarzewski /agency-agents：A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whi

▸ soxoj /maigret：🕵️‍♂️ Collect a dossier on a person by username from 3000+ sites

▸ commaai /openpilot：openpilot is an operating system for robotics. Currently, it upgrades the driver assistance system o

▸ logto-io /logto：🧑‍🚀 Authentication and authorization infrastructure for SaaS and AI apps, built on OIDC and OAuth 2.

▸ xbtlin /ai-berkshire：AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code / Codex 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a v
text: 今日共收录276篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究188篇, 开源项目44篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API14篇。热门标签：Agent（74篇）。其中6%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
